storeOs.cloudCompatibility: FULL — no filesystem access, no AJV. All Shopify API calls use shopifyOAuth2Api credential injected by n8n. shop_url and api_version sourced from runtime_config (resolved by resolve-runtime-config from STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL / STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_API_VERSION env vars or smoke_test_config).
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1. Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config, store_blueprint }
storeOs.output: { status: 'PHASE_7B1_COMPLETE' | 'PHASE_7B1_PARTIAL' | 'PHASE_7B1_FAILED', project_id, shop_url, products_created, products_updated, collections_created, collections_updated, errors, warnings, blueprint_summary, safety_notes }
safetyGuarantees: No Shopify resources are ever deleted — only create (POST) and update (PUT) operations
Upsert by handle: existing handles are updated, new handles are created
All new products are created with status: draft — never auto-published
continueOnFail: true on HTTP nodes — errors are collected, not fatal
neverError: true on HTTP nodes — HTTP 4xx/5xx return as items, not exceptions

shopifyOAuth2Api.name: Shopify SuppliedTech Admin
shopifyOAuth2Api.note: Replace id with your n8n shopifyOAuth2Api credential ID if deploying to a different instance

setupRequired: Replace credential id 'edgLmgVntFGX6QYN' in Fetch Existing Collections, Fetch Existing Products, Create Resource, and Update Resource nodes with your n8n shopifyOAuth2Api credential ID
Ensure STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL and STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_API_VERSION are set in env (self-hosted) or smoke_test_config (cloud)
